WFRP4E_SIM.Title: WFRP4e Combat Simulator
WFRP4E_SIM.DragActors: Drag actors from the sidebar onto each side. Use at least two sides.
WFRP4E_SIM.ActorMissing: Actor not found — may have been deleted
WFRP4E_SIM.NeedTwoSides: Need at least two sides with combatants.
WFRP4E_SIM.ApplyResults.Title: Apply Results to Actors?
WFRP4E_SIM.ApplyResults.Prompt: Apply the average wounds and critical wounds from this simulation to the real actor sheets? This will reduce each combatant's current Wounds by their average damage taken across all iterations.
WFRP4E_SIM.AppliedResults: Applied average simulation results to actor sheets.
WFRP4E_SIM.Warn.ActorNotFound: Dropped actor could not be resolved.
WFRP4E_SIM.Warn.MinimumSides: At least two sides are required.
WFRP4E_SIM.Error.NeedTwoSides: You need at least two sides with combatants before running a simulation.
WFRP4E_SIM.Location.head: Head
WFRP4E_SIM.Settings.DefaultIterations.Hi: Default number of combat iterations to run.
WFRP4E_SIM.Settings.MaxRounds.Name: Default Max Rounds
WFRP4E_SIM.Settings.MaxRounds.Hint: Maximum number of rounds per simulated combat before a timeout winner is decided.
WFRP4E_SIM.Settings.SuppressChat.Name: Suppress Chat Messages
WFRP4E_SIM.Settings.SuppressChat.Hint: Prevent the wfrp4e system from posting roll messages to chat during simulations. Recommended.
